skill.complextalents.eight_formation_bat: Ultimate: Requires 8 Equilibrium. Applies Exposed with all 8 gates. Complete all 8 gates to trigger Yin Yang Annihilation - true damage from any angle.
skill.complextalents.pincer_lunge.desc: Channel to dash. Channel < 1s: Quick dash + dagger throw (1 Yang). Channel 1s+: Long dash with line damage + spear impale (2 Yang).
skill.complextalents.sword_dance.desc: A lightning-fast dash of 8 blocks that activates gates. Dashing through your harmonized target activates two gates. Correct gate hits refund cooldown. Empty gates don't cost Equilibrium.
skill.complextalents.seraphic_echo.desc: Divine Orb: Move the seraphic orb to a target location. Damages and slows enemies, while granting speed and absorption to allies on its path. Cast on the orb itself to pull nearby enemies.
